allow: PowerShell(python -c "import streamlit, plotly, PIL, numpy, pandas; print\('deps OK', streamlit.__version__\)")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8511" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($ok\) { "APP UP: HTTP 200" } else { "APP NOT RESPONDING" })
